# TokenAdvisor

> Real-time AI token usage and cost tracking system

## What It Is
TokenAdvisor is an internal tool built by BuiltByBas that tracks token usage and costs across multiple AI API providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google AI) in real time.

## Key Features
- Per-call token and cost tracking
- Multi-provider support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google AI)
- Real-time dashboard with live cost counters
- Self-validating cost calculations
- Reconciliation against actual provider billing
- Model-specific pricing with version control
- Cross-project usage aggregation

## Built By
BuiltByBas - builtbybas.com
